pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21; using it with Java 21 causes compilation errors or runtime failures due to deprecated/removed APIs and incompatible bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 11, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing issues if the build environment enforces the target version.
